People interested in the novel Emma include directors and producers of its adaptations, such as Autumn de Wilde (2020 film), Douglas McGrath (1996 film), and Amy Heckerling (1995 film Clueless, inspired by Emma).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?person ?name WHERE {
  ?adaptation wdt:P144 wd:Q223880 .
  {
    ?adaptation wdt:P57 ?person
  } UNION {
    ?adaptation wdt:P162 ?person
  } UNION {
    ?adaptation wdt:P50 ?person
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?name
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
  }
}
```
